message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as user1
participant "uic : UIController" as uic
participant "UIExt : UIExtension" as uie
participant "mp : MacrosPanel" as mp
participant "sui : ScriptUI" as sui

user1 -> uie : select macro window
activate uie
uie -> mp : create(uic)
deactivate uie

user1 -> mp : Choose write a script
activate mp
mp -> sui : create(uic)
deactivate mp

actor "User" as user2
participant "uic : UIController" as uic2
participant "UIExt : UIExtension" as uie2
participant "mp : MacrosPanel" as mp2
participant "sui : ScriptUI" as sui2

@enduml
